THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POWELL, RICHARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 161 POWELL ST, #709, SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL OCT-10-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS. IF DEFT VACATES BY 10-OCT-95, PLTF SHALL STIP TO VACATE THE JUDGMENT & FILE A DISMISSAL. DEFT TO PREPARE PAPERWORK WITHIN 30 DAYS. SEE JUDGMENT.
